text:
Long. 76° 38' E.
Balance of Mercury Dasa at birth : Years 5-10-25.
The Second House.—In Chart No. 43, Aries is the 2nd
house. It is not aspected by any planet—good or bad.
Hence it is fairly strong.
The Second Lord.—Mars is the lord of the 2nd and he
is in the 9th from Lagna in his own sign. This is a fortunate
combination. In the Navamsa Mars is in the 4th with the
Moon and Mercury—the association with the first

102 How to Judge a Horoscope
planet being good and with second being bad. Lord of the
second is moderately good.
Lord of Wealth.—Jupiter is debilitated in the 11th but
there is a distinct cancellation of the neecha effect as Saturn
owner of that house is in a quadrant from the Moon. This is
a benefic yoga and results in much gain.
Conclusion.—Note lord of the 2nd and the 2nd house
have no connection with the 6th or 6th lord. The subject
will therefore contract no debts whatsover. The financial
position will generally be sound. Mars Dasa would be
